Name: List of Commodity
Query: Give me List of commodity that India deal in year 2018/19
SQL: select distinct commodity from output_schema.cmd_trd_dft where year = 201819 and pct_change_yr_compr=0;
Table and column used:
Table 1: output_schema.cmd_trd_dft
Columns used: commodity, year, pct_change_yr_compr

Name: Total Trade deficit of all commodities
Query: Total commodity trade deficit in year 2024/25
SQL: select sum(trd_dft_inr_cr) as trd_dft_2025 from output_schema.cmd_trd_dft where year = 202425 and pct_change_yr_compr=0 group by year, pct_change_yr_compr;
Table and column used:
Table 1: output_schema.cmd_trd_dft
Columns used: commodity, year, pct_change_yr_compr, trd_dft_inr_cr

Name: All time export for a commodity I
Query: Total export for commodity with hscode 71 across the years
SQL: select sum(exp_inr_cr) as total_exp_acrss_yr from output_schema.cmd_trd_dft where pct_change_yr_compr = 0 and hscode = 71 group by hscode;
Table and column used:
Table 1: output_schema.cmd_trd_dft
Columns used: exp_inr_cr, pct_change_yr_compr, hscode

Name: All time export for a commodity II
Query: Total export for  FERTILISERS. commodity across the years
SQL: select sum(exp_inr_cr) as total_exp_acrss_yr from output_schema.cmd_trd_dft where pct_change_yr_compr = 0 and commodity='FERTILISERS.' group by commodity;
Table and column used:
Table 1: output_schema.cmd_trd_dft
Columns used: exp_inr_cr, pct_change_yr_compr, commodity

Name: Top 10 commodity with highest export
Query: Give me list of top 10 commodities with how much they export in inr crore with highest export in year 2019/20
SQL: select commodity, exp_inr_cr from output_schema.cmd_trd_dft where pct_change_yr_compr = 0 and year = 201920 order by exp_inr_cr desc limit 10;
Table and column used:
Table 1: output_schema.cmd_trd_dft
Columns used: exp_inr_cr, pct_change_yr_compr, commodity, year

Name: Import greater than 10 percent
Query: List of commodities and there percentage in import share whose percentage import share is greater than 10 trade deficit in year 2024/25
SQL: select commodity, imp_pct_share from output_schema.cmd_trd_dft where pct_change_yr_compr = 0 and year = 201920 and imp_pct_share>10;
Table and column used:
Table 1: output_schema.cmd_trd_dft
Columns used: imp_pct_share, pct_change_yr_compr, year, commodity

Name: Highest trade deficit growth than last year
Query: Which commodity has he highest growth percentage than last year in trade deficit for year 2023/24
SQL: select commodity, trd_dft_pct_change from output_schema.cmd_trd_dft where pct_change_yr_compr = 1 and year = 202324 order by trd_dft_pct_change desc limit 1;
Table and column used:
Table 1: output_schema.cmd_trd_dft
Columns used: trd_dft_pct_change, pct_change_yr_compr, year, commodity

Name: Growth every year in export
Query: List of commodities which has shown growth in export for every year as compare to last year till 2024/25
SQL:
WITH valid_growth AS (
    SELECT
        commodity,
        hscode,
        year,
        exp_pct_change
    FROM output_schema.cmd_trd_dft
    where pct_change_yr_compr = 1
)
SELECT commodity
FROM valid_growth
GROUP BY hscode,commodity
HAVING COUNT(*) = COUNT(CASE WHEN exp_pct_change > 0 THEN 1 END);
Table and column used:
Table 1: output_schema.cmd_trd_dft
Columns used: year, commodity, hscode, exp_pct_change

Name: Always be positive trade deficit
Query: List of coomdities whose trade deficit is positive for all the years till 202425
SQL:
SELECT commodity
FROM (
  SELECT
    commodity,
    hscode,
    year,
    trd_dft_inr_cr
FROM output_schema.cmd_trd_dft
where pct_change_yr_compr = 0
)
GROUP BY hscode,commodity
HAVING COUNT(*) = COUNT(CASE WHEN trd_dft_inr_cr > 0 THEN 1 END);
Table and column used:
Table 1: output_schema.cmd_trd_dft
Columns used: year, commodity, hscode, trd_dft_inr_cr

Name: Five years import growth
Query: List of commodities for which increase in import is greater than 10 percent as campare to five year ago for year 2022/23
SQL: select commodity, year, imp_pct_change from output_schema.cmd_trd_dft where imp_pct_change > 10 and pct_change_yr_compr=5 and year = 202223;
Table and column used:
Table 1: output_schema.cmd_trd_dft
Columns used: year, commodity, imp_pct_change, pct_change_yr_compr

Name: Highest trade deficit growth than last year
Query: Which country has the highest growth percentage than last year in trade deficit for year 2023/24
SQL:
SELECT country, trd_dft_pct_change
FROM output_schema.cntry_trd_dft
WHERE pct_change_yr_compr = 1
  AND year = 202324
  AND trd_dft_pct_change IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY trd_dft_pct_change DESC
LIMIT 1;
Table and column used:
Table 1: output_schema.cntry_trd_dft
Columns used: country, trd_dft_pct_change, pct_change_yr_compr, year

Name: Growth every year in export
Query: List of countries which has shown growth in export for every year as compare to last year till 2024/25
SQL:
WITH valid_growth AS (
    SELECT
        country,
        cntry_cd,
